use_cases: Triggering form submissions in data-entry interfaces
Primary call-to-action in pricing or conversion sections
Toggling UI states like sidebars or panels
ai_summary: A versatile button component built on Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, providing multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options (default, small, large, icon). Features standard focus-visible outlines, hover states, and disabled states with smooth CSS transitions. Designed as a foundational atomic component for React interfaces, commonly paired with calendar, side panel, and form components in modern SaaS applications.
